The Fund invests at least 80% of the value of the Fund's assets in U.S.-listed companies that, at the time of investment, the Adviser determines satisfy one or more of the objective criteria below relating to AI data center real estate and related digital infrastructure.

Nutrien Ltd. provides crop inputs and services. The Company produces and distributes potash, nitrogen, and phosphate products for agricultural, industrial, and feed customers. Nutrien serves the agriculture industry worldwide.

DivcoWest Properties offers real estate investment opportunities across the United States. The Company offers a range of services such as asset, property and construction management, leasing and accounting. Divco invests in commercial and residential properties.

Oklahoma Development Finance Authority operates as an economic development agency. The Agency offers statewide financial resource to support business, higher education, public infrastructure, and healthcare. Oklahoma Development Finance Authority serves customers in the State of Oklahoma.

Data Center Power & Cooling ETF is an ETF incorporated in the U.S. The Fund seeks capital appreciation. The Fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in equity securities of U.S.-listed companies that, at the time of investment, the Adviser determines are "significantly involved" in U.S. data center power and cooling infrastructure.

City of La Habra is located in the County of Orange in the State of California. The City provides a range of government services including recreation and culture, water, wastewater collection, storm drainage, and general administration. La Habra operates under a Council-Manager form of government.

DoubleLine Ultrashort Income ETF is an actively managed fixed income ETF incorporated in the United States. DLUX seeks to generate current income and total return, consistent with preservation of capital. The Fund invests in investment grade-rated U.S. dollar-denominated fixed income securities with an average effective duration less than one year.

unmapped_funds.fund_name: REPSOL E&P CAPITAL MARKETS US LLC
unmapped_funds.fund_description: Repsol E&P Capital Markets US LLC operates as a special purpose entity. The Company provides downstream businesses in natural gas, crude oil, and products marketing and trading, as well as produces electricity from its solar plant. Repsol E&P Capital Markets US serves customers worldwide.

unmapped_funds.fund_name: DOW JONES COMMODITY INDEX NORTH AMERICAN COPPER ER

unmapped_funds.fund_description: Mitsui Fudosan Co., Ltd. provides overall real estate services such as leasing, subdivision, construction, sales, and maintenance of office buildings and residential houses. The Company also manufactures building materials, operates commercial facilities including hotels and golf places, and provides financial services such as securitization of real estate properties.

Port of Morrow of Oregon is a port based in the County of Morrow in the State of Oregon. The Port accounts for the operations of three industrial parks including an airport and shipping facility. Port of Morrow operates in the State of Oregon.
Marel hf. provides food processing technology. The Company offers machinery for poultry, fish, and meat sectors. Marel serves customers worldwide.

Nuclear Energy & Infrastructure ETF is an ETF incorporated in the U.S. The Fund seeks capital appreciation. The Fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in equity securities of U.S.-listed companies that, at the time of investment, the Adviser determines satisfy one or more of the objective criteria below relating to the nuclear energy value chain and the infrastructure that enables it.
RTG Mining Inc., explores and develops high grade copper/gold projects. Current focus is the high grade Mabilo Project in the Philippines.

THOR AdaptiveRisk Dynamic ETF is an exchange-traded fund incorporated in the United States. The Fund seeks to provide capital appreciation. The Fund invests in stocks, exchange-traded funds and leveraged ETFs that invest in equities, fixed income, commodities, and alternatives.

Envision Healthcare Operating, Inc. provides health care services. The Company specializes in anesthesia, radiology, anesthesiology treatment, and newborn deliveries care for patients from advanced practice providers in operating rooms and ambulatory surgery centers through consulting services. Envision Healthcare Operating serves communities in the United States.

unmapped_funds.fund_name: TWIN OAK ACTIVE OPPORTUNITIES III ETF
unmapped_funds.fund_description: Twin Oak Active Opportunities III ETF is an ETF incorporated in the U.S. The Fund aims is long-term capital appreciation. The Fund invests in equity securities of small, medium, and large companies and fixed-income securities such as government or corporate bonds issued by a variety of entities.

LPL Technologies, Inc. has three major product lines which it acquired through mergers and acquititions.  Products include connectors and related assemblies, coaxial cable and high technology fiber optic transmission systems.

Westmont Hillstop School District is based in the City of Johnstown in the State of Pennsylvania. The School District provides educational opportunities for students in grade levels Kindergarten through Grade 12. The District serves students in the Township of Upper Yoder and the Boroughs of Westmont and Southmont.

Ellwood City Area School District is based in the Borough of Ellwood City in the State of Pennsylvania. The School District provides educational opportunities for students in grade levels Kindergarten through Grade 12. Ellwood City Area School District serves students in the Boroughs of Ellwood City, Ellport and Wampum as well as the Townships of Perry and Wayne.
